mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.code, c.description, c.status, c.create_date, c.update_date, c.created_by, c.updated_by, cu.role FROM company c LEFT JOIN company_user cu ON c.id = cu.company_id AND cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.status = 1 WHERE c.status = 1 AND ( cu.user_id = #{userId} OR c.code = #{userId} ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.code = 'personal' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, cu.role DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_user cu INNER JOIN user u ON cu.user_id = u.id WHERE cu.company_id = #{companyId} AND cu.status = 1 AND u.disabled = 0
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.user_account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.telephone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
SELECT id, user_id, company_id, position_id, role, join_date, status, create_by FROM company_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND company_id = #{companyId} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_user ( id, user_id, company_id, role, join_date, status, create_by ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{companyId}, #{role}, #{joinDate}, #{status}, #{createBy} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user u WHERE u.disabled = 0 AND u.role != 'system'
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.user_account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.telephone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
SELECT id, company_id, department_name, description, create_time FROM company_department WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT id, position_name, department_id, description, create_time FROM company_position WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
